Add at least one vehicle to start receiv: Fügen Sie mindestens ein Fahrzeug hinzu, um Anfragen zu erhalten.
At least one city is required.
At least one country is required.
Complete Stripe onboarding and enable pa: Complete Stripe onboarding and enable payouts before held funds can be released.
Create your account and start receiving: Create your account and start receiving transport requests.
Create your Stripe Connect account first: Create your Stripe Connect account first, then come back to release held trip funds.
Deleted {{count}} driver user(s). Kept {: Deleted {{count}} driver user(s). Kept {{email}}. Non-driver roles were not targeted.
Delivered and completed requests are rem: Gelieferte und abgeschlossene Anfragen werden auf diesem Bildschirm nicht angezeigt.
Enter your price and timing so the custo: Enter your price and timing so the customer can choose your offer.
Estimated delivery must be a valid date/: Estimated delivery must be a valid date/time.
Estimated delivery must be after estimat: Estimated delivery must be after estimated pickup.
Estimated duration must be a whole numbe: Estimated duration must be a whole number.
Estimated duration must be between 1 and: Estimated duration must be between 1 and 10080 minutes.
Estimated pickup must be a valid date/ti: Estimated pickup must be a valid date/time.
Estimated pickup must be in the future.
Akzeptierte Aufträge konnten nicht geladen werden.
Auszahlungsfähige Fahrten konnten nicht geladen werden.
Funds are held because Stripe payouts ar: Funds are held because Stripe payouts are not enabled yet.
Funds stay held until you create a Strip: Funds stay held until you create a Stripe Connect payout account.
Held funds are ready to release for this: Held funds are ready to release for this delivered trip.
Held funds were released successfully to: Held funds were released successfully to your Stripe-connected payout account.
Jobs where the customer accepted your of: Aufträge, bei denen der Kunde Ihr Angebot angenommen hat.
Make sure you are online and your availa: Make sure you are online and your availability is active.
Message must be at most 1000 characters.
Missing request ID. Please go back to Av: Missing request ID. Please go back to Available Requests.
No delivered trip is currently selected: No delivered trip is currently selected for release in this summary.
No delivered trip is waiting for payout: Derzeit wartet keine gelieferte Fahrt auf eine Auszahlungsfreigabe.
Password must be at least 8 characters.
Payout is not available for this trip ye: Payout is not available for this trip yet.
Releasing held funds to your Stripe payo: Releasing held funds to your Stripe payout account...
Review new transport requests and choose: Review new transport requests and choose which ones you want to quote.
Set availability first before changing o: Legen Sie zuerst die Verfügbarkeit fest, bevor Sie den Online-Status ändern.
Set up your payout account to receive ea: Richten Sie Ihr Auszahlungskonto ein, um Einnahmen direkt auf Ihr Bankkonto zu erhalten.
Sign in to manage your transport request: Sign in to manage your transport requests.
Stripe did not create a new payout relea: Stripe did not create a new payout release for this trip.
The app will only request payout release: The app will only request payout release when the trip is payout-eligible and Stripe payouts are ready.
The app will reload to apply right-to-le: The app will reload to apply right-to-left layout.
The customer will compare offers and cho: The customer will compare offers and choose the best driver.
The last payout release attempt for this: The last payout release attempt for this trip failed.
This email is already in use. Try loggin: This email is already in use. Try logging in.
This phone number is already in use.
This trip must reach Delivered or Comple: This trip must reach Delivered or Completed before payout release is available.
You are offline and will not receive new: Sie sind offline und erhalten keine neuen Anfragen.
You are online and can receive matching: Sie sind online und können passende Anfragen erhalten.
You need to complete Stripe Connect onbo: Sie müssen das Stripe-Connect-Onboarding abschließen, um Auszahlungen zu erhalten. Andernfalls bleiben Ihre Einnahmen ausstehend.
Your account was approved. Refresh to co: Ihr Konto wurde genehmigt. Aktualisieren Sie, um mit dem nächsten Schritt fortzufahren.
Your driver account is under admin revie: Ihr Fahrerkonto wird derzeit von der Administration geprüft.
Your offer is pending customer review. W: Ihr Angebot wartet auf die Prüfung durch den Kunden. Wir benachrichtigen Sie, sobald der Kunde gewählt hat.
Your payout account is ready. Delivered: Your payout account is ready. Delivered trips can be released from here.
Your Stripe Connect account can receive: Ihr Stripe-Connect-Konto kann Auszahlungen empfangen. Sobald eine Lieferung bestätigt ist, können zurückgehaltene Gelder auf Ihr verbundenes Auszahlungskonto freigegeben werden.
Your submission was declined by admin re: Ihre Einreichung wurde von der Administration abgelehnt. Sie können zum Login zurückkehren und es später erneut versuchen.
